taskName.description: The name of the replication (migrate) task to create.

sourceConnectionId.description: The connection id of the source database to read from.

sourceDatabaseType.description: The database type of the source connection, e.g. MongoDB, Mysql, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SqlServer.

targetConnectionId.description: The connection id of the target database to write to.

targetDatabaseType.description: The database type of the target connection, e.g. MongoDB, Mysql, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SqlServer.

migrateTableSelectType.description: How to select the source tables to replicate. 'custom' means the user explicitly lists the tables (provide them in 'tableNames'). 'expression' means matching tables by a regular expression (provide it in 'tableExpression'); to replicate ALL tables use the expression '.*'.

tableNames.description: The explicit list of source table/collection names to replicate. Required when migrateTableSelectType is 'custom'.

tableExpression.description: A regular expression used to match source table names to replicate. Required when migrateTableSelectType is 'expression'. For example 't_.*' matches tables starting with 't_'; use '.*' to replicate all tables.

syncType.description: The sync type: initial_sync (full sync only), initial_sync+cdc (full + incremental), cdc (incremental only). Default: initial_sync+cdc.
